hero.title: Ergo

hero.description: The globally-neutral settlement layer for programmable money.
hero.message1: Decentralized Money for a Free Society
hero.message2: The globally-neutral settlement layer for programmable money.
hero.message3: The open-source home of digital freedom
hero.message4: Join the movement for decentralized, open-source money

seo.defaultTitle: Ergo Platform - Resilient Blockchain for Contractual Money
seo.defaultDescription: Ergo builds advanced cryptographic features and radically new DeFi functionality on the rock-solid foundations laid by a decade of blockchain theory and development.
seo.keywords: blockchain, cryptocurrency, DeFi, smart contracts, Ergo, UTXO, proof of work

technology.title: Technology
technology.subtitle: Advanced blockchain technology
technology.description: Explore Ergo's cutting-edge features: eUTXO, ErgoScript, Sigma Protocols, and more.

eutxoModel.title: eUTXO Model
eutxoModel.description: Extended UTXO model that enables parallel smart contract execution and composable DeFi applications. Eliminates reentrancy attacks while maintaining Bitcoin's proven security model.

parallelExecution.title: Parallel Execution
parallelExecution.description: Smart contracts run independently without global state conflicts.

composability.title: Composability
composability.description: Build complex DeFi applications from simple, reusable components.

ergoScript.title: ErgoScript
ergoScript.description: Powerful smart contract language designed for security and flexibility. Features built-in Sigma protocols for zero-knowledge proofs and formal verification support for bulletproof contracts.

formalVerification.title: Formal Verification
formalVerification.description: Mathematically prove your smart contracts are secure and bug-free.

sigmaProtocols.title: Sigma Protocols
sigmaProtocols.description: Zero-knowledge proofs enable privacy-preserving transactions and smart contracts.

functionalLanguage.title: Functional Programming
functionalLanguage.description: Based on Scala, providing powerful abstractions for complex contract logic.

nipopows.title: NiPoPoWs
nipopows.description: Non-interactive Proofs of Proof of Work enable lightweight clients and cross-chain communication. Allows anyone to verify Bitcoin's proof of work without running a full node.

lightweightClients.title: Lightweight Clients
lightweightClients.description: Verify blockchain state without downloading the entire chain.

crossChain.title: Cross-Chain Communication
crossChain.description: Connect different blockchains using proof of work verification.

bitcoinIntegration.title: Bitcoin Integration
bitcoinIntegration.description: Direct integration with Bitcoin's proof of work security.

storageRent.title: Storage Rent
storageRent.description: Novel economic mechanism that prevents UTXO set bloat while maintaining censorship resistance. Requires regular payments to keep data on the blockchain.

preventBloat.title: Prevent UTXO Bloat
preventBloat.description: Automatically removes unused or unpaid UTXOs from the set.

economicIncentive.title: Economic Incentives
economicIncentive.description: Creates market-driven pricing for blockchain storage.

censorshipResistance.title: Censorship Resistance
censorshipResistance.description: No centralized authority can arbitrarily remove data.

oraclePools.title: Oracle Pools
oraclePools.description: Decentralized oracle system providing real-world data to smart contracts. Uses economic incentives and cryptography to ensure data accuracy and availability.

decentralizedData.title: Decentralized Data Feeds
decentralizedData.description: Multiple independent oracles provide data without single points of failure.

economicSecurity.title: Economic Security
economicSecurity.description: Cryptographic commitments and staking ensure oracle honesty.

predictionMarkets.title: Prediction Markets
predictionMarkets.description: Built-in support for decentralized prediction markets and derivatives.

autolykos.title: Autolykos
autolykos.description: ASIC-resistant proof of work algorithm designed specifically for Ergo. Balances between CPU/GPU mining accessibility and resistance to specialized hardware.

asicResistance.title: ASIC Resistance
asicResistance.description: Algorithm parameters adjust automatically to prevent ASIC dominance.

accessibility.title: Mining Accessibility
accessibility.description: Allows anyone with consumer hardware to participate in mining.

adaptiveDifficulty.title: Adaptive Difficulty
adaptiveDifficulty.description: Automatically adjusts mining difficulty based on network conditions.

sigmaProtocols.title: Sigma Protocols
sigmaProtocols.description: Advanced cryptographic protocols enabling zero-knowledge proofs, ring signatures, and threshold cryptography. Foundation for privacy-preserving DeFi applications.

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs
zeroKnowledge.description: Prove statements about secret data without revealing the data itself.

ringSignatures.title: Ring Signatures
ringSignatures.description: Hide transaction sender among multiple possible signers.

thresholdCrypto.title: Threshold Cryptography
thresholdCrypto.description: Split cryptographic keys among multiple parties for enhanced security.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Growing ecosystem of applications and services
ecosystem.description: Discover the vibrant ecosystem of dApps, tools, and services built on Ergo.

use.title: Use Cases
use.subtitle: Practical applications of Ergo technology
use.description: Explore how Ergo's unique features enable innovative decentralized applications.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Latest news and updates
blog.description: Stay up to date with the latest developments in the Ergo ecosystem.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Join the global Ergo community
community.description: Connect with developers, users, and enthusiasts from around the world.

wallet.title: Wallets
wallet.subtitle: Secure your ERG tokens
wallet.description: Choose from a variety of wallets to store and manage your ERG tokens securely.

mining.title: Mining
mining.subtitle: Start mining ERG tokens
mining.description: Learn how to mine ERG using the Autolykos proof of work algorithm.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Technical documentation and guides
docs.description: Comprehensive documentation for developers and users.

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Educational resources and guides
learn.description: Learn about Ergo blockchain technology and development.
